comment: Gzip byte budgets enforced by the build gate (tools/build-check.mjs) over apps/desktop/dist. Calibrated ~3x above the fresh scaffold (React 19 + the shell ≈ 60 KB total gzip) so real features fit while an accidental heavyweight dependency (charting lib, moment, lodash) or an unsplit route bundle turns the gate red. Raising a budget is a reviewed human decision — this file is write-guard-protected.
